final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing trifold travel brochure for a 4-day Hangzhou itinerary, with real Hangzhou map as background, famous landmarks floating on cardstock.

Style/medium: trifold brochure design, map-based infographic
Composition: three-panel fold layout, landmarks floating above cardstock
Subject: Hangzhou 4-day travel itinerary (West Lake, Lingyin Temple, Jiuxi, Grand Canal/Xixi Wetland)
Scene/backdrop: authentic Hangzhou city map as background
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: cardstock paper texture, floating landmark illustrations
Text (verbatim): "第一天：西湖经典游" "断桥残雪→白堤→孤山→曲院风荷→苏堤春晓→花港观鱼→雷峰塔→柳浪闻莺" "第二天：禅意杭州" "灵隐寺→飞来峰造像→法喜寺→宋城" "第三天：九溪烟树" "九溪十八涧→龙井村→十里琅珰→云栖竹径" "第四天：文艺收官"
Constraints: 
Avoid:
